channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Lions and DT Alim McNeill agree to $97 million, 4-year deal in franchise's latest investment
item.description: ALLEN PARK, Mich. (AP) — The Detroit Lions have decided to make defensive tackle Alim McNeill their latest investment, retaining a key player with a long-term deal. “Fired up for Mac, he earned that,” Lions coach Dan Campbell said Wednesday. “He's a pivotal piece for us.
item.dc:creator: LARRY LAGE, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Jets superfan Fireman Ed takes issue with lack of screen time at stadium: 'They’re phasing us out'
item.description: New York Jets superfan known as Fireman Ed accused the organization of phasing him and his group out after not getting enough time on the video boards at MetLife Stadium.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Ravens' dynamic duo of Henry and Jackson help lead a rushing renaissance in the NFL
item.description: Inside the Numbers dives into NFL statistics, streaks and trends each week. For more Inside the Numbers, head here. ___ The running game has had a bit of a renaissance early this season thanks in part to a dynamic duo in Baltimore off to a historic start.
item.dc:creator: JOSH DUBOW, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Johnny Gaudreau's best friend on Blue Jackets scores goal, points to late star's name hanging in rafters
item.description: Sean Monahan never got a chance to play with his best friend again, but after scoring a goal on Tuesday, he pointed to Johnny Gaudreau's name hanging in the rafters.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Angel Reese says her little brother lied about a key aspect about her basketball career
item.description: Angel Reese esponded to a video of her brother, 21-year-old Maryland men's basketball player Julian Reese, claiming that she is not a natural left-hander.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Injured Alex Cobb dropped from Guardians' ALCS roster, replaced by Ben Lively
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Pitcher Alex Cobb was dropped from Cleveland's American League Championship Series roster on Tuesday after he got hurt yet again in the opener, leaving the Guardians in search of a Game 5 starter against the New York Yankees. “It’s been a challenging year.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Judge hits first home run of this postseason and Yankees beat Guardians 6-3 for 2-0 ALCS lead
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Aaron Judge sent the ball soaring toward Monument Park and Gleyber Torres tagged up at first base. “That was disrespect out of Gleyber, man,” Judge said with a smile. “He’s seen me hit 58 of those things this year.
item.dc:creator: RONALD BLUM, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: For Johnny and Matthew: Blue Jackets play their home opener with Gaudreaus in mind
item.description: Johnny Gaudreau’s Columbus teammates were given a few options for how to handle their emotions during the Blue Jackets’ home opener. If you want to cry, cry. If you want to laugh, laugh. The only rules — play the game the way “Johnny Hockey” would and with him in mind.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Breanna Stewart and her wife Marta Xargay receive homophobic threats after Game 1 of WNBA Finals
item.description: MINNEAPOLIS (AP) — New York Liberty star Breanna Stewart and her wife Marta Xargay received threatening homophobic anonymous emails after Game 1 of the WNBA Finals. The emails went directly to Xargay's account, which was a bit unnerving for the couple, Stewart said at practice on Tuesday.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FEINBERG, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Jets acquire wide receiver Davante Adams from Raiders, reuniting him with Aaron Rodgers
item.description: Aaron Rodgers and Davante Adams are finally reunited after more than two years of separation and one year of speculation — and now they’ll try to save the New York Jets' sinking season.
item.dc:creator: DENNIS WASZAK Jr., Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: NFL owners approve Jacksonville's $1.4 billion 'stadium of the future' set to open in 2028
item.description: NFL owners unanimously approved Jacksonville's $1.4 billion “stadium of the future” Tuesday, a decision that should keep the Jaguars in one of the league's smallest markets for at least another 30 years.
item.dc:creator: MARK LONG, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: San Diego Sockers release 2024-2025 season tickets and schedule
item.description: Season tickets and the full season schedule for the San Diego Sockers' 2024-2025 season are now available for fans to purchase.
item.dc:creator: Anna Ashcraft, Fox 5

item.title: Steelers QB Russell Wilson 'in consideration' to start against the Jets in return from calf injury
item.description: PITTSBURGH (AP) — Russell Wilson's time may be fast approaching in Pittsburgh. Coach Mike Tomlin said Tuesday that Wilson is “in consideration” to be the starting quarterback when the Steelers (4-2) host the New York Jets (2-4) on Sunday night.
item.dc:creator: WILL GRAVES, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: New Jersey hands Utah its first loss, 3-0
item.description: NEWARK, N.J. (ABC4 Sports) - After scoring an NHL-leading 16 goals through the first three games of the season, the Utah Hockey Club had a devil of a time scoring at New Jersey.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Los Angeles Rams implementing new AI technology during football games
item.description: The technologically advanced home of the Los Angeles Rams is about to have a new way for fans to track players’ statistics from their seats during the game.
item.dc:creator: Will Conybeare, KTLA 5

item.title: North Carolina football player dies from rare lung cancer at 23
item.description: UNC had honored Tylee Craft, 23, during Saturday's game. Coach Mack Brown, however, said he hadn't learned of Craft's death until after the game.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Bears TE Cole Kmet catches 2 of Caleb Williams' 4 TD passes, handles long snaps in 35-16 rout of Jaguars in London
item.description: WATCH: Jarrett Payton loves what he's seeing from the Bears' offense in the attached video from Monday's WGN Morning News. LONDON (AP) — Chicago Bears tight end Cole Kmet faced his biggest fear in football with no notice. In a snap, you might say.
item.dc:creator: KEN MAGUIRE, Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Bears dominate Jaguars in London, 35-16, to extend winning streak to 3 games going into bye week
item.description: The Bears capped off their London trip in style Sunday, routing the Jacksonville Jaguars, 35-16, at Tottenham Hotspur Stadium to extend their winning streak to three games and improve to 4-2 on the season.
item.dc:creator: Michael Johnson, WGN 9

item.title: BYU improves to 6-0 after trouncing Arizona, 41-19
item.description: PROVO, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - The BYU football team continues to prove all the preseason prognosticators wrong. The #14 Cougars battered Arizona Saturday at LaVell Edwards Stadium to improve to 6-0 for the first time since 2020 with a dominating 41-19 victory.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Breanna Stewart and the Liberty look to bounce back and even WNBA Finals series against the Lynx
item.description: The two-time MVP and her teammates will need to be at their best on Sunday when they face the Lynx in Game 2 of the best-of-five series.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FEINBERG, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Report: Cam Rising to start tomorrow at Arizona State
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - It looks like Cam Rising is ready to return to the field. According to a report by ActionNetwork's Brett McMurphy, Rising will start at quarterback for the #16 Utah football team tomorrow night at Arizona State.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Betts and Ohtani help the Dodgers stay alive in NLDS with 8-0 win vs the Padres
item.description: SAN DIEGO (AP) — Mookie Betts homered for the second straight night, Shohei Ohtani hit an RBI single and the Los Angeles Dodgers beat Dylan Cease and the San Diego Padres 8-0 on Wednesday night to force a deciding Game 5 in their tense NL Division Series.
item.dc:creator: BERNIE WILSON, Associated Press, KTLA 5

item.title: BYU looks to pick up where it left off after bye week
item.description: PROVO, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - It's not ideal to have a bye week while on a five-game winning streak, but #14 BYU needed the rest after getting off to a 5-0 start.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: California lawmakers write letter urging schools to pay athletes directly
item.description: (KRON) -- A pair of California state senators wrote a letter on Wednesday urging schools in the Golden State to change how collegiate athletes are paid.
item.dc:creator: Phil Mayer, KRON4
